title: Tommy Hawk: Bounty Hunter
description: Tommy Hawk, bounty hunter, pursues a diverse slate of fugitives in Reno, Nevada.
quote: God don’t make no junk… except you!
altHero: Tommy Hawk, a white man with bright blonde long hair, wearing a Jesus tank top and flexing his biceps
alt1: Tommy aiming a crossbow in a junkyard
alt3: Tommy showing a wanted flyer on screen
